query:
Plan a trip with the following preferences:
Origin: London
Destination: Giza Governorate
Dates: 2026-07-07 to 2026-07-09
Budget: Luxury
Party: Family
Interests: Cultural Tourism, Camel Riding

results.assertion: Travel Plan correctly strictly follows the schema.
results.reason: The travel plan adheres to the expected schema structure, including top-level keys like trip_name, itinerary, and landmarks, with correct data types for each field and nested objects.

results.assertion: Accommodation suggestions are relevant to the city and user preferences.
results.reason: The plan suggests 'Barcelo Cairo Pyramids' which is located in Giza and is described as 'luxurious', aligning with the user's preference for 'Luxury' budget and destination 'Giza Governorate'. It also fits 'Family' implicitly.

results.assertion: Budget constraints are respected throughout the itinerary.
results.reason: The plan is explicitly categorized as 'Luxury' and the suggested accommodation (Barcelo Cairo Pyramids) and dining options (Khufu's, Rooftop 7000, Aspero, Zoe, XODÓ) support this. The estimated activity costs are reasonable for entry fees and private tours in a luxury context.

results.assertion: The daily sequence of activities is logically ordered chronologically (morning, afternoon, evening).
results.reason: For each day, the activities are listed with specific time slots that follow a logical chronological order from morning through to the evening.

judge_grader.reason: All specified constraints (Destination, Duration, Budget, Number of People, Dates) are met by the travel plan.

generated_plan.trip_name: Family Trip to Giza: Pyramids and Cultural Wonders
generated_plan.trip_summary: A luxurious 3-day family adventure from Cairo to Giza Governorate, exploring ancient wonders, enjoying diverse cultural experiences, and indulging in fine dining near iconic landmarks. This itinerary is packed with historical sites and local culture, designed for an immersive experience.

activities.title: Hotel Check-in: Barcelo Cairo Pyramids
activities.description: Arrive in Giza and check into the luxurious Barcelo Cairo Pyramids, conveniently located for exploring the area. Drop off your luggage and prepare for a day of ancient discoveries.

activities.title: Explore the Pyramids of Giza & Giza Necropolis
activities.description: Begin your journey into ancient Egypt by visiting the iconic Pyramids of Giza, including the Great Pyramid and the vast Necropolis. This sprawling site is a must-see for its historical significance and offers opportunities for camel riding, a favorite family activity.

activities.title: Visit the Pyramid of Khafre
activities.description: Continue your exploration within the Giza Necropolis with a focused visit to the impressive Pyramid of Khafre, offering a closer look at its structure and history.

activities.title: Lunch at Khufu's Restaurant
activities.description: Enjoy a well-deserved lunch at Khufu's Restaurant, known for its local and international cuisine, and perhaps some Chef's Specials. It’s located conveniently near the Giza plateau.

activities.title: Sphinx Tours
activities.description: Delve deeper into the mysteries of the Sphinx area with dedicated tours, providing insights into this monumental guardian.

activities.title: Immerse in History at Pharaonic Village
activities.description: Travel to the Pharaonic Village for an engaging cultural experience, showcasing ancient Egyptian life through reenactments and exhibits.

activities.title: Relaxing Boat Tour on the Nile
activities.description: Unwind with a pleasant boat tour, offering unique perspectives of Giza and a relaxing end to a busy day of sightseeing.

activities.title: Visit تمثال كليوباترا
activities.description: Conclude your day with a visit to تمثال كليوباترا (Cleopatra Statue), an interesting cultural highlight.

activities.title: Dinner with a View at Rooftop 7000
activities.description: Enjoy a delicious dinner featuring local and international cuisine at Rooftop 7000, offering a fantastic ambiance after a long day.

itinerary.day: Day 2: City Views and Sphinx Secrets

activities.title: Panoramic Views from Cairo Tower
activities.description: Start your day with breathtaking panoramic views of Cairo and Giza from the iconic Cairo Tower, a modern marvel amidst ancient history.

activities.title: Explore سراى الإستقبال
activities.description: Visit سراى الإستقبال, another significant cultural site offering architectural beauty and historical insights.

activities.title: Lunch at Dahabiya Cairo
activities.description: Savor local and international flavors for lunch at Dahabiya Cairo, a highly-rated restaurant.

activities.title: Discover ميناء القرية
activities.description: Take some time to explore ميناء القرية, offering a different cultural perspective.

activities.title: Encounter the Great Sphinx of Giza
activities.description: Return to the Giza plateau for an up-close encounter with the enigmatic Great Sphinx of Giza, a monumental statue guarding the pyramids.

activities.title: Explore Valley Temple of Khafre and SPHINX FOUNTAIN
activities.description: Visit the ancient Valley Temple of Khafre, an essential part of the pyramid complex, and the nearby SPHINX FOUNTAIN (ABOTALEB BRG.), both offering rich historical context.

activities.title: Visit Pioneer Travel Egypt
activities.description: Engage with the cultural offerings at Pioneer Travel Egypt, providing further insight into the region's heritage.

activities.title: Dinner at Aspero Restaurant & Lounge
activities.description: Conclude your day with a delightful dinner at Aspero Restaurant & Lounge, offering a cafe/patisserie experience.

activities.title: Discover Ahmed Shawky Museum
activities.description: Begin your day with a cultural immersion at the Ahmed Shawky Museum, dedicated to the renowned Egyptian poet.

activities.title: Explore Cleopatra Museum
activities.description: Continue your museum visits at the Cleopatra Museum, offering exhibits related to the legendary queen.

activities.title: Lunch at Zoe
activities.description: Enjoy a pleasant lunch at Zoe, a restaurant known for its local and international cuisine.

activities.title: Experience a Panoramic View of Giza
activities.description: Head to a designated panoramic view spot to capture stunning photos and absorb the majestic scale of the Giza pyramids complex from a distance.

activities.title: Explore منطقة اهرامات الجيزة
activities.description: Take some time to revisit or explore new facets of منطقة اهرامات الجيزة, the wider area encompassing the pyramids.

activities.title: Discover سراي العرش and برج الساعة
activities.description: Visit سراي العرش and the nearby برج الساعة (Clock Tower), two more cultural landmarks with unique architectural styles.

activities.title: Experience Cairo, Egito.
activities.description: Immerse yourself in the local atmosphere and culture at the attraction simply named Cairo, Egito., offering a unique local perspective.

activities.title: Farewell Dinner at XODÓ
activities.description: Enjoy a luxurious farewell dinner at XODÓ, featuring a delightful selection of local and international cuisine.

budget_breakdown: Accommodation: EGP 2400 (2 nights at Barcelo Cairo Pyramids)
Food: EGP 2100 (estimated for 2 meals per day for a family)
Activities: EGP 5250 (estimated for all listed attractions)
